input: In React useEffect is common but useState is more fundamental. Add an at symbol before useState. Actually I use useReducer more now. Put an at before useReducer. ideal: In React useEffect is common but @useState is more fundamental. Actually I use @useReducer more now. The hook @useCallback helps performance. And my teammate @Alex prefers @useMemo. Finally mention the library @react itself.
